The SPLSTATE.IDS file has a limit of 256 entries, starting with a default of 133.
When installing mods adding new entries, install errors may occur when going above
the limit. Any components that I'm aware of adding new states will be noted along
with how many entries, so you can take it into account.
The biggest additions are SCS and ToF with 40~ new states each, followed by EE
Fixpack and Enhanced Powergaming Scripts with 20~.
